audiences.label: GIS Analysts & Cartographers
audiences.pain: They know Overture data exists and is free, but setting up DuckDB or a Python CLI just to grab buildings for one neighborhood kills their afternoon.

audiences.label: Urban Planners & Municipal Staff
audiences.pain: They need current road networks and building footprints for reports but their ArcGIS credits are always running low and IT won't approve new tools.

audiences.label: Geo Developers & Data Engineers
audiences.pain: They prototype apps fast but spinning up the Overture CLI for every new bounding box in a new project slows down iteration.

audiences.label: Geography Students & Academic Researchers
audiences.pain: They want global POI or building data for a study area but have no AWS credentials, no Python env set up, and no time to learn GeoParquet.

audiences.label: OpenStreetMap Power Users & HOT Mappers
audiences.pain: They want to cross-reference or supplement OSM data with Overture's 64M+ POIs for a region but every existing workflow requires cloud infrastructure they don't have.

videos.hook: You can get free Overture Maps building data in 30 seconds — no Python, no terminal.
videos.thumbnailText:
FREE BUILDING DATA
NO CODING NEEDED
videos.thumbnailStyle: Dark navy background. Bold white and electric-cyan text. Left side shows a glowing bounding-box rectangle drawn over a city map. Right side shows a clean download arrow icon. Minimal, technical aesthetic.
videos.imagePrompt: Cinematic aerial view of a dense city at night, buildings illuminated with glowing cyan wireframe outlines overlaid on rooftops, a glowing rectangular bounding box selection drawn across several city blocks, midnight-blue atmosphere, photorealistic, 8k, geospatial data visualization aesthetic, subtle grid overlay, no people, high contrast
videos.audioFeel: Minimal lo-fi electronic with a clean synth arp. Think Bonobo meets a productivity app soundtrack. No drops, no distractions. Steady forward motion.

videos.hook: My ArcGIS credits ran out downloading building data. There's a better way.
videos.thumbnailStyle: High contrast vertical frame. Top half: red credit burn icon or dollar sign bleeding out. Bottom half: clean green download interface on dark background. Bold white text. Urgent, punchy.
videos.imagePrompt: Cinematic close-up of a glowing digital map interface on a dark background, a hand drawing a glowing rectangular selection box over a city plan, electric blue and green UI elements, dramatic side lighting, photorealistic, midnight-blue geospatial aesthetic, no text in image, 4k
videos.audioFeel: Punchy lo-fi beat that builds quickly then drops into a satisfying resolution. Short, no padding.

videos.hook: DuckDB vs. Overture Downloader — same data, very different experience.
videos.thumbnailText:
CLI vs BROWSER
WHICH IS FASTER?
videos.thumbnailStyle: Split-screen thumbnail. Left half: dark terminal window with scrolling code, slightly red-tinted. Right half: clean glowing map interface with a drawn bounding box, cyan-tinted. Bold white label text on each half. VS in the center in bright yellow.
videos.imagePrompt: Split-scene cinematic composition, left side shows a dark terminal CLI with faint green code text and a slight red atmospheric glow, right side shows a glowing interactive web map with a luminous cyan bounding-box rectangle drawn over a city, both halves separated by a bright vertical dividing line, midnight-blue geospatial aesthetic, photorealistic, 8k, no people
videos.audioFeel: Clean minimal electronic, sparse percussion, subtle tension building to a clean finish. Think neutral documentary background music for a tech tutorial.

videos.hook: Get global building data for your thesis study area — free, in 60 seconds.
videos.thumbnailStyle: Bright academic-meets-tech aesthetic. Bold sans-serif text top and bottom. Center shows a glowing map with a bounding box drawn over a recognizable city shape. Electric blue on dark background. Clean and urgent.
videos.imagePrompt: Cinematic top-down view of an illuminated city map at night, glowing cyan grid lines overlaid on city blocks, a bright rectangular selection box drawn over a university campus district, deep midnight-blue background, photorealistic, geospatial aesthetic, subtle data point particles floating upward, 8k, no people, no text
videos.audioFeel: Upbeat lo-fi hip hop with a clean sample chop. Study-session energy. Something like Lofi Girl meets a tech startup ad.

videos.hook: Overture Maps has 64 million POIs. Here's how to pull just the ones you need.
videos.thumbnailStyle: Dark atmospheric map covered in thousands of tiny glowing point clusters, a drawn selection rectangle highlights one dense cluster. Bold electric-yellow stat text top-left. Clean CTA text bottom. Deep navy background.
videos.imagePrompt: Cinematic bird's-eye view of a dense global point-of-interest map at night, thousands of tiny glowing yellow and cyan data points scattered across a dark city grid, a luminous rectangular selection box drawn over a dense cluster of points, midnight-blue background, photorealistic, geospatial data visualization, 8k, epic scale, no text, no people
videos.audioFeel: Ambient electronic with a slow pulse and subtle data-sonification texture. Think Brian Eno meets a mapping startup. Calm but intelligent.
